findings.evidence: `rg -n "Hermitian|IsHermitian" code/TauCeti/LinearAlgebra/Matrix/SymmetricPart.lean` hits only the import line; `mathlib/Mathlib/LinearAlgebra/QuadraticForm/Basic.lean:13` publicly imports `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Symmetric`.
findings.fix: Drop the Hermitian import; the needed `Matrix.IsSymm`/quadratic-form matrix infrastructure is already supplied by `Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.QuadraticForm.Basic`, while `selfAdjointPart`/`skewAdjointPart` come from `Mathlib.Algebra.Star.Module`.
findings.issue: `import Mathlib.LinearAlgebra.Matrix.Hermitian` is a broad Hermitian-matrix import, but this file only uses symmetric-matrix, quadratic-form, Euclidean-space, and star-module projection API.

summary: The generic matrix API is now in a natural linear-algebra module and the PDE preservation theorem is in the PDE file. One broad Mathlib import remains unnecessary in the new matrix file.
